name: Quaker's: Pumpkin Oat Streusel Muffins
recipeIngredient: QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned), 1/4 cup
QUAKER Oats uncooked (quick or old fashioned), 1 cup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Line 12 medium muffin cups with paper baking cups or lightly grease the bottoms only.
3. For the streusel, combine all ingredients and mix well. Set aside.
4. In a separate bowl, combine dry ingredients and chopped nuts (if using). Mix well.
5. Add the combined pumpkin, milk, oil, and egg to the dry mixture. Stir until just combined.
6. Fill each muffin cup almost full with batter.
7. Sprinkle streusel evenly over the batter, patting gently.
8. Bake for 22 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Allow muffins to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing.
